Interface ILSRXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a Local Space Rectangular transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("DEB5E788-AD75-43FB-97E5-1155AA717203")]
public interface ILSRXform : IGeodataXform
